zh.帮助: 我是 SibyX-AI，SibyX 的官方助手机器人。你可以问我：怎么用 / 加密 / 端到端 / 频道 / 私有频道 / 私聊 / 好友 / 邀请 / 备份 / 恢复 / 自托管 / 中继 / 文件 / 通知 / 安全 / 隐私 / 价格 / 开源 / License / AI 机器人。频道里请 @SibyX-AI 提问，也可以把我加为好友后私聊。
zh.help: 我是 SibyX-AI，SibyX 的官方助手机器人。你可以问我：怎么用 / 加密 / 端到端 / 频道 / 私有频道 / 私聊 / 好友 / 邀请 / 备份 / 恢复 / 自托管 / 中继 / 文件 / 通知 / 安全 / 隐私 / 价格 / 开源 / License / AI 机器人。频道里请 @SibyX-AI 提问，也可以把我加为好友后私聊。
zh.你好: 你好，我是 SibyX-AI。SibyX 的主张是：一个链接，即刻加密沟通。无需账号，无需安装，消息端到端加密，也可自托管掌控。
zh.hello: 你好，我是 SibyX-AI。SibyX 的主张是：一个链接，即刻加密沟通。无需账号，无需安装，消息端到端加密，也可自托管掌控。
zh.你是谁: 我是 SibyX-AI，SibyX 的官方助手机器人。我负责常见问题解答、每日提示和新用户引导。我不会索要你的私钥、助记词、备份文件或密码，也不会主动读取所有人的私密聊天。
zh.sibyx是什么: SibyX 是一个轻量私有沟通工具：打开链接即可进入频道或私有房间，不需要手机号、邮箱或传统账号。私聊和私有频道使用端到端加密，中继只负责转发密文。你可以使用 SibyX 托管中继，也可以把中继部署到自己的服务器上。
zh.what is sibyx: SibyX 是一个轻量私有沟通工具：打开链接即可进入频道或私有房间，不需要手机号、邮箱或传统账号。私聊和私有频道使用端到端加密，中继只负责转发密文。你可以使用 SibyX 托管中继，也可以把中继部署到自己的服务器上。
zh.标语: SibyX 的主标题是：一个链接，即刻加密沟通。副标题是：无需账号，无需安装，消息端到端加密，也可自托管掌控。
zh.slogan: SibyX 的主标题是：一个链接，即刻加密沟通。副标题是：无需账号，无需安装，消息端到端加密，也可自托管掌控。
zh.怎么用: 快速上手：第一步，打开链接即可进入，无需注册或安装；第二步，在频道里聊天，或进入指定房间沟通；第三步，点击对方消息旁的加好友按钮，互为好友后可发起端到端加密私聊；第四步，请尽早备份身份密钥，避免换设备或清缓存后丢失身份。
zh.quickstart: 快速上手：第一步，打开链接即可进入，无需注册或安装；第二步，在频道里聊天，或进入指定房间沟通；第三步，点击对方消息旁的加好友按钮，互为好友后可发起端到端加密私聊；第四步，请尽早备份身份密钥，避免换设备或清缓存后丢失身份。
zh.账号: SibyX 不需要传统账号。你的身份由浏览器本地生成的密钥决定，不绑定手机号、邮箱或平台账号。这样减少注册摩擦，也减少中心化账号数据库带来的风险。请注意：身份密钥如果丢失，平台无法像传统账号一样帮你找回，所以务必备份。
zh.account: SibyX 不需要传统账号。你的身份由浏览器本地生成的密钥决定，不绑定手机号、邮箱或平台账号。这样减少注册摩擦，也减少中心化账号数据库带来的风险。请注意：身份密钥如果丢失，平台无法像传统账号一样帮你找回，所以务必备份。
zh.安装: SibyX 默认无需安装。它是浏览器即可使用的 Web 应用，打开链接就能沟通。你也可以把它添加到手机或电脑桌面，像普通 App 一样使用，但这不是必须步骤。
zh.install: SibyX 默认无需安装。它是浏览器即可使用的 Web 应用，打开链接就能沟通。你也可以把它添加到手机或电脑桌面，像普通 App 一样使用，但这不是必须步骤。
zh.链接: SibyX 的核心体验是“一个链接，即刻加密沟通”。别人收到链接后，可以直接在浏览器打开并进入指定频道或房间。它适合临时项目、小团队、客户沟通、Web3 小圈子和自托管社区。
zh.link: SibyX 的核心体验是“一个链接，即刻加密沟通”。别人收到链接后，可以直接在浏览器打开并进入指定频道或房间。它适合临时项目、小团队、客户沟通、Web3 小圈子和自托管社区。
zh.加密: SibyX 的私聊和私有频道使用端到端加密。私聊通过 ECDH 派生共享密钥，再用 AES-GCM 加密消息；公开频道主要是签名可验证，默认不以保密为目标；私有频道通过频道密钥加密内容。中继只负责转发密文，不能读取私聊和私有频道明文。
zh.encryption: SibyX 的私聊和私有频道使用端到端加密。私聊通过 ECDH 派生共享密钥，再用 AES-GCM 加密消息；公开频道主要是签名可验证，默认不以保密为目标；私有频道通过频道密钥加密内容。中继只负责转发密文，不能读取私聊和私有频道明文。
zh.端到端: 端到端加密的意思是：明文只在发送者和接收者设备上出现，服务器、中继和托管方都不应看到明文。SibyX 的红线是：私钥和明文只留在浏览器端；中继只转发密文、公钥和必要元数据。
zh.e2ee: E2EE 是 End-to-End Encryption，也就是端到端加密。SibyX 中，私聊和私有频道内容由客户端加密后再发送，中继只见密文。公开频道不适合发送敏感内容，因为公开频道的设计目标是可见和可验证，而不是保密。
zh.中继: 中继是 SibyX 的消息转发层。它像一个管道，负责帮助不同浏览器同步消息，但不持有你的私钥，也不解密私聊或私有频道内容。你可以使用公共或托管中继，也可以部署自己的私有中继来掌控运行环境。
zh.relay: 中继是 SibyX 的消息转发层。它像一个管道，负责帮助不同浏览器同步消息，但不持有你的私钥，也不解密私聊或私有频道内容。你可以使用公共或托管中继，也可以部署自己的私有中继来掌控运行环境。
zh.服务器: 服务器或中继可以看到必要的同步数据，例如频道名、消息时间、发送者地址、公钥、公开频道明文，以及私聊/私有频道密文。它不能看到你的私钥，也不能解密私聊或私有频道内容。公开频道本身不适合放敏感信息。
zh.server: 服务器或中继可以看到必要的同步数据，例如频道名、消息时间、发送者地址、公钥、公开频道明文，以及私聊/私有频道密文。它不能看到你的私钥，也不能解密私聊或私有频道内容。公开频道本身不适合放敏感信息。
zh.身份: SibyX 的身份不是手机号或账号，而是一组本地生成的密钥。签名密钥用于证明“这条消息确实是你发的”，加密密钥用于建立私聊密钥。你的地址由公钥派生，别人可以用它识别你，但不能用它冒充你。
zh.identity: SibyX 的身份不是手机号或账号，而是一组本地生成的密钥。签名密钥用于证明“这条消息确实是你发的”，加密密钥用于建立私聊密钥。你的地址由公钥派生，别人可以用它识别你，但不能用它冒充你。
zh.私钥: 你的私钥只应保存在本地浏览器或你导出的加密备份中。不要把私钥、助记词或备份口令发给任何人，包括自称官方人员的人。SibyX-AI 不会向你索要私钥、助记词或密码。
zh.private key: 你的私钥只应保存在本地浏览器或你导出的加密备份中。不要把私钥、助记词或备份口令发给任何人，包括自称官方人员的人。SibyX-AI 不会向你索要私钥、助记词或密码。
zh.手机号: SibyX 不需要手机号。我们认为私密沟通工具不应强制把身份绑定到手机号码。你的身份由本地密钥生成，因此更适合临时协作、小团队、开发者、Web3 社群和自托管用户。
zh.phone: SibyX 不需要手机号。我们认为私密沟通工具不应强制把身份绑定到手机号码。你的身份由本地密钥生成，因此更适合临时协作、小团队、开发者、Web3 社群和自托管用户。
zh.地址: SibyX 地址是由你的签名公钥派生出的短身份标识，通常以 0x 开头。地址可以公开，用来识别你、添加好友或验证消息来源。地址不是私钥，别人知道你的地址也不能登录你的身份。
zh.address: SibyX 地址是由你的签名公钥派生出的短身份标识，通常以 0x 开头。地址可以公开，用来识别你、添加好友或验证消息来源。地址不是私钥，别人知道你的地址也不能登录你的身份。
zh.频道: 频道是按名称聚合的沟通空间。输入同一个频道名的人会进入同一个频道。公开频道适合欢迎、公告、测试和公开讨论；敏感内容请使用私聊或私有频道。频道名本身可能被中继看到，不建议把秘密直接写进频道名。
zh.channel: 频道是按名称聚合的沟通空间。输入同一个频道名的人会进入同一个频道。公开频道适合欢迎、公告、测试和公开讨论；敏感内容请使用私聊或私有频道。频道名本身可能被中继看到，不建议把秘密直接写进频道名。
zh.公开频道: 公开频道中的消息主要是签名可验证，不默认加密。所有进入同一频道的人都可以看到内容。公开频道适合大厅、问答、公告和非敏感讨论；如果要讨论私密内容，请切换到私聊或私有频道。
zh.public channel: 公开频道中的消息主要是签名可验证，不默认加密。所有进入同一频道的人都可以看到内容。公开频道适合大厅、问答、公告和非敏感讨论；如果要讨论私密内容，请切换到私聊或私有频道。
zh.私有频道: 私有频道是成员制加密频道。被批准的成员会获得频道密钥，消息内容使用频道密钥加密；未持有频道密钥的人即使看到同步数据，也无法读取明文。适合小团队、客户沟通、项目组和私密社群。
zh.private channel: 私有频道是成员制加密频道。被批准的成员会获得频道密钥，消息内容使用频道密钥加密；未持有频道密钥的人即使看到同步数据，也无法读取明文。适合小团队、客户沟通、项目组和私密社群。
zh.私聊: 私聊是两个人之间的端到端加密对话。先互相加为好友，客户端会基于双方的 ECDH 公钥派生共享密钥，再用 AES-GCM 加密消息。中继只看到密文和必要元数据，无法读取私聊正文。
zh.dm: 私聊是两个人之间的端到端加密对话。先互相加为好友，客户端会基于双方的 ECDH 公钥派生共享密钥，再用 AES-GCM 加密消息。中继只看到密文和必要元数据，无法读取私聊正文。
zh.好友: 好友关系用于建立更稳定的私聊入口。你可以在频道里点击对方消息旁的加好友按钮，对方接受后，你们就可以从好友列表进入端到端加密私聊。添加好友时交换的是公钥和签名信息，不会交换私钥。
zh.friend: 好友关系用于建立更稳定的私聊入口。你可以在频道里点击对方消息旁的加好友按钮，对方接受后，你们就可以从好友列表进入端到端加密私聊。添加好友时交换的是公钥和签名信息，不会交换私钥。
zh.添加: 如果你想把我加为好友，可以在频道里点击我消息旁的加好友按钮。我会自动通过好友请求，之后你可以私聊向我提问。请记住：我不会索要你的私钥、助记词、备份文件或密码。
zh.add: 如果你想把我加为好友，可以在频道里点击我消息旁的加好友按钮。我会自动通过好友请求，之后你可以私聊向我提问。请记住：我不会索要你的私钥、助记词、备份文件或密码。
zh.邀请: 邀请链接可以把别人带到指定频道或房间。SibyX 的传播方式不是让用户先注册账号，而是先进入场景、开始沟通，再按需要备份身份。邀请别人加入前，请确认频道类型：公开频道适合公开讨论，私有频道适合敏感内容。
zh.invite: 邀请链接可以把别人带到指定频道或房间。SibyX 的传播方式不是让用户先注册账号，而是先进入场景、开始沟通，再按需要备份身份。邀请别人加入前，请确认频道类型：公开频道适合公开讨论，私有频道适合敏感内容。
zh.备份: 备份非常重要。SibyX 没有中心账号系统，无法通过手机号或邮箱找回身份。请在设置中导出加密备份，并离线保存。备份通常由你的口令保护，口令不要上传、不要发给任何人。换设备、清缓存或重装浏览器前，请先备份。
zh.backup: 备份非常重要。SibyX 没有中心账号系统，无法通过手机号或邮箱找回身份。请在设置中导出加密备份，并离线保存。备份通常由你的口令保护，口令不要上传、不要发给任何人。换设备、清缓存或重装浏览器前，请先备份。
zh.恢复: 恢复用于把此前备份的身份导入新设备或新浏览器。选择恢复功能，导入加密备份并输入备份口令，即可找回同一个 SibyX 身份。恢复只在你拥有备份和口令时有效，平台无法替你重置口令。
zh.restore: 恢复用于把此前备份的身份导入新设备或新浏览器。选择恢复功能，导入加密备份并输入备份口令，即可找回同一个 SibyX 身份。恢复只在你拥有备份和口令时有效，平台无法替你重置口令。
zh.丢失: 如果你丢失了身份备份、助记词或备份口令，SibyX 通常无法帮你找回原身份。这是无账号和本地密钥身份的代价。你可以生成新身份继续使用，但旧身份、好友关系和只能由旧密钥解密的历史内容可能无法恢复。
zh.lost: 如果你丢失了身份备份、助记词或备份口令，SibyX 通常无法帮你找回原身份。这是无账号和本地密钥身份的代价。你可以生成新身份继续使用，但旧身份、好友关系和只能由旧密钥解密的历史内容可能无法恢复。
zh.多设备: 多设备使用的关键是同一身份的安全恢复。你可以在原设备导出加密备份，在新设备导入恢复。这样新设备可以使用同一个 SibyX 身份。请不要把未加密私钥或口令通过聊天软件发送给自己。
zh.multi: 多设备使用的关键是同一身份的安全恢复。你可以在原设备导出加密备份，在新设备导入恢复。这样新设备可以使用同一个 SibyX 身份。请不要把未加密私钥或口令通过聊天软件发送给自己。
zh.自托管: 自托管意味着你可以把 SibyX 中继部署到自己的 VPS 或服务器上。这样你可以掌控运行环境、域名、日志策略和可用性。只要服务器只转发密文、不接触私钥和明文，自托管不会破坏端到端加密边界。
zh.self-host: 自托管意味着你可以把 SibyX 中继部署到自己的 VPS 或服务器上。这样你可以掌控运行环境、域名、日志策略和可用性。只要服务器只转发密文、不接触私钥和明文，自托管不会破坏端到端加密边界。
zh.托管: 托管中继适合不想运维服务器的个人和小团队。SibyX 可以提供更稳定的常驻中继，但托管方仍不应读取私聊或私有频道明文。托管解决的是连接、在线和运维问题，不是替你保管私钥。
zh.hosted: 托管中继适合不想运维服务器的个人和小团队。SibyX 可以提供更稳定的常驻中继，但托管方仍不应读取私聊或私有频道明文。托管解决的是连接、在线和运维问题，不是替你保管私钥。
zh.价格: SibyX 的个人沟通能力可以保持轻量开放；真正适合收费的是稳定的私有中继、托管运维、自定义域名、更大附件、团队配置和部署支持。SibyX 卖的不是普通聊天功能，而是个人和小团队可掌控的私有加密沟通基础设施。
zh.pricing: SibyX 的个人沟通能力可以保持轻量开放；真正适合收费的是稳定的私有中继、托管运维、自定义域名、更大附件、团队配置和部署支持。SibyX 卖的不是普通聊天功能，而是个人和小团队可掌控的私有加密沟通基础设施。
zh.pro: Pro 或付费能力可以包括：更稳定的中继、更大附件、语音或媒体能力、私有中继、团队配置、自定义域名和优先支持。具体权益以当前页面说明为准。无论是否付费，私钥都不应离开你的设备。
zh.文件: 文件和附件应在客户端加密后再上传或同步。中继或对象存储只应看到密文文件和指针，不应看到明文文件内容。敏感文件请优先通过私聊或私有频道发送，不要发到公开频道。
zh.file: 文件和附件应在客户端加密后再上传或同步。中继或对象存储只应看到密文文件和指针，不应看到明文文件内容。敏感文件请优先通过私聊或私有频道发送，不要发到公开频道。
zh.附件: 附件的安全原则和消息相同：明文只在发送者和接收者设备上出现。发送附件时，客户端应先加密文件，再把密文或密文指针同步给对方。请确认当前频道类型，敏感附件不要发到公开频道。
zh.attachment: 附件的安全原则和消息相同：明文只在发送者和接收者设备上出现。发送附件时，客户端应先加密文件，再把密文或密文指针同步给对方。请确认当前频道类型，敏感附件不要发到公开频道。
zh.通知: 通知用于提醒你有人 @你、发来私聊或有重要频道消息。浏览器通知需要你授权。为了保护隐私，通知内容应尽量避免暴露敏感正文，尤其是在锁屏或共享设备上。
zh.notification: 通知用于提醒你有人 @你、发来私聊或有重要频道消息。浏览器通知需要你授权。为了保护隐私，通知内容应尽量避免暴露敏感正文，尤其是在锁屏或共享设备上。
zh.推送: Web Push 可以在页面后台时提醒你有新消息。理想情况下，推送只传“有新消息”这样的信号，不传敏感正文。你可以在浏览器或系统设置里管理通知权限。
zh.push: Web Push 可以在页面后台时提醒你有新消息。理想情况下，推送只传“有新消息”这样的信号，不传敏感正文。你可以在浏览器或系统设置里管理通知权限。
zh.安全: SibyX 的安全边界是：私钥不出设备，私聊和私有频道内容端到端加密，中继不读明文。你仍需要保护自己的设备、浏览器、备份文件和口令。不要点击可疑链接，不要泄露备份，不要把敏感信息发到公开频道。
zh.security: SibyX 的安全边界是：私钥不出设备，私聊和私有频道内容端到端加密，中继不读明文。你仍需要保护自己的设备、浏览器、备份文件和口令。不要点击可疑链接，不要泄露备份，不要把敏感信息发到公开频道。
zh.隐私: SibyX 的隐私设计重点是：不需要手机号或中心账号，私钥本地生成和保存，私聊与私有频道端到端加密，中继只转发密文。请注意，公开频道内容对同频道成员可见，元数据如时间、频道名和地址也可能被中继看到。
zh.privacy: SibyX 的隐私设计重点是：不需要手机号或中心账号，私钥本地生成和保存，私聊与私有频道端到端加密，中继只转发密文。请注意，公开频道内容对同频道成员可见，元数据如时间、频道名和地址也可能被中继看到。
zh.匿名: SibyX 无需账号和手机号，因此比传统账号系统更少暴露身份信息。但它不是“绝对匿名”工具：你的地址、昵称、公开频道发言、时间和网络层信息仍可能形成线索。请不要把公开频道当成匿名安全区。
zh.anonymous: SibyX 无需账号和手机号，因此比传统账号系统更少暴露身份信息。但它不是“绝对匿名”工具：你的地址、昵称、公开频道发言、时间和网络层信息仍可能形成线索。请不要把公开频道当成匿名安全区。
zh.元数据: 端到端加密保护消息内容，但不一定隐藏所有元数据。中继可能看到频道名、时间、消息大小、发送者地址、公钥、回执和连接信息。SibyX 的目标是让内容保密，同时保持系统轻量和可自托管。
zh.metadata: 端到端加密保护消息内容，但不一定隐藏所有元数据。中继可能看到频道名、时间、消息大小、发送者地址、公钥、回执和连接信息。SibyX 的目标是让内容保密，同时保持系统轻量和可自托管。
zh.开源: 开源和端到端加密是两个不同维度。开源让别人能审计代码；端到端加密保证运行时服务器看不到私聊或私有频道明文。SibyX 的理想状态是：关键代码可审计，中继只转发密文，私钥和明文只在用户设备上出现。
zh.open source: 开源和端到端加密是两个不同维度。开源让别人能审计代码；端到端加密保证运行时服务器看不到私聊或私有频道明文。SibyX 的理想状态是：关键代码可审计，中继只转发密文，私钥和明文只在用户设备上出现。
zh.license: SibyX 可以采用按组件划分的组合许可证：SDK 用 MIT 以便开发者接入，Web 客户端用 Apache-2.0 方便企业采用，中继核心用 AGPL-3.0 防止别人直接闭源做竞品服务，托管服务使用商业服务协议。Logo、名称和品牌资产通常不包含在开源授权内。
zh.ai: SibyX-AI 是静态规则型助手机器人，主要回答产品常见问题和发送提示。它不会自动读取所有人的私密消息。频道里需要 @SibyX-AI 才会触发回复；私聊机器人则视为你主动提问。
zh.机器人: SibyX-AI 可以在频道里回答常见问题，也可以通过私聊提供帮助。它适合做入门引导、每日提示、频道说明和安全提醒。它不应该被设计成读取用户全部聊天内容的后台 AI，因为那会破坏端到端加密边界。
zh.bot: SibyX-AI 可以在频道里回答常见问题，也可以通过私聊提供帮助。它适合做入门引导、每日提示、频道说明和安全提醒。它不应该被设计成读取用户全部聊天内容的后台 AI，因为那会破坏端到端加密边界。
zh.agent: SibyX 也适合未来扩展到 AI Agent 通讯。核心思路是：Agent 的身份也可以是一把密钥，而不是中心化 API key。SibyX 负责私密传输和密钥身份，Agent 框架负责任务语义和工作流。
zh.sdk: SibyX SDK 的目标是把身份、加密和中继能力抽成开发者可复用的库。理想用法是：生成本地密钥身份，连接任意 SibyX 中继，发送端到端加密消息。SDK 适合开发者、小团队、Agent 项目和自托管集成。
zh.开发者: 对开发者来说，SibyX 的价值不是“又一个聊天 App”，而是一个轻量、可自托管、无账号的 E2EE 通讯层。你可以用它快速搭建小团队私有房间、项目沟通频道、Agent 消息通道或嵌入式加密沟通能力。
zh.developer: 对开发者来说，SibyX 的价值不是“又一个聊天 App”，而是一个轻量、可自托管、无账号的 E2EE 通讯层。你可以用它快速搭建小团队私有房间、项目沟通频道、Agent 消息通道或嵌入式加密沟通能力。
zh.团队: SibyX 适合个人、小团队和小型组织。它的优势是：一个链接进入、无需安装、无账号、私聊和私有频道端到端加密，并且可以使用私有中继掌控运行环境。它不适合取代所有大型企业协作套件，但适合作为轻量私密沟通房间。
zh.team: SibyX 适合个人、小团队和小型组织。它的优势是：一个链接进入、无需安装、无账号、私聊和私有频道端到端加密，并且可以使用私有中继掌控运行环境。它不适合取代所有大型企业协作套件，但适合作为轻量私密沟通房间。
zh.web3: SibyX 对 Web3 社群的价值在于“密钥即身份”。它不要求手机号或中心账号，适合 DAO 小圈子、项目协作、临时讨论和密钥身份实验。请注意，SibyX 本身不等于钱包登录，也不要在公开频道泄露私钥或助记词。
zh.客户: SibyX 可以用于“每个客户一个加密房间”的场景。客户无需安装 App，也不需要先注册账号，打开链接即可进入沟通。对于敏感客户内容，请使用私有频道或私聊，并提前说明备份身份的重要性。
zh.client: SibyX 可以用于“每个客户一个加密房间”的场景。客户无需安装 App，也不需要先注册账号，打开链接即可进入沟通。对于敏感客户内容，请使用私有频道或私聊，并提前说明备份身份的重要性。
zh.signal: Signal 是成熟、可信、经过长期检验的安全通讯应用。SibyX 不应声称比 Signal 更安全。SibyX 的差异是：无需手机号、无需安装、链接即用、轻量自托管和私有中继。它更适合小团队、开发者、自托管用户和临时私密房间。
zh.telegram: Telegram 强在大群、频道、机器人和传播生态。SibyX 不追求成为大型社交平台，而是专注于小范围私密沟通：无账号、无安装、私聊和私有频道端到端加密、可自托管中继。
zh.matrix: Matrix / Element 是强大的开放协议和自托管协作生态，适合组织级部署。SibyX 更轻：一个链接即可进入，部署和使用都更简单，适合个人、小团队、临时项目和不想维护复杂通讯栈的用户。
zh.局限: SibyX 也有边界：公开频道不是保密空间；端到端加密不隐藏全部元数据；如果你丢失身份备份，平台通常无法找回；自托管需要基本运维能力；它不是大型企业套件，也不是绝对匿名工具。
zh.limit: SibyX 也有边界：公开频道不是保密空间；端到端加密不隐藏全部元数据；如果你丢失身份备份，平台通常无法找回；自托管需要基本运维能力；它不是大型企业套件，也不是绝对匿名工具。
zh.滥用: SibyX 用于合法的个人和团队私密沟通，不支持诈骗、骚扰、恶意软件协作、非法交易或其他滥用。托管中继可能根据基础设施信号、支付风险、垃圾行为举报或服务条款违规暂停服务，但不会通过读取端到端加密正文来审核内容。
zh.abuse: SibyX 用于合法的个人和团队私密沟通，不支持诈骗、骚扰、恶意软件协作、非法交易或其他滥用。托管中继可能根据基础设施信号、支付风险、垃圾行为举报或服务条款违规暂停服务，但不会通过读取端到端加密正文来审核内容。
zh.手机: SibyX 可以在手机浏览器中使用，也可以添加到主屏幕形成类似 App 的体验。为了避免丢失身份，请在手机清缓存、换浏览器或换设备前先导出加密备份。
zh.mobile: SibyX 可以在手机浏览器中使用，也可以添加到主屏幕形成类似 App 的体验。为了避免丢失身份，请在手机清缓存、换浏览器或换设备前先导出加密备份。
zh.浏览器: SibyX 依赖浏览器的本地存储和 WebCrypto 能力。建议使用现代浏览器，并避免频繁清理站点数据。如果浏览器数据被清除而你没有备份身份，原身份可能无法恢复。
zh.browser: SibyX 依赖浏览器的本地存储和 WebCrypto 能力。建议使用现代浏览器，并避免频繁清理站点数据。如果浏览器数据被清除而你没有备份身份，原身份可能无法恢复。

en.帮助: I am SibyX-AI, the official assistant bot for SibyX. You can ask me about: how to use SibyX, encryption, E2EE, channels, private channels, private DMs, friends, invites, backup, restore, self-hosting, relays, files, notifications, security, privacy, pricing, open source, licenses, and AI bots. Mention @SibyX-AI in a channel, or add me as a friend and message me privately.
en.help: I am SibyX-AI, the official assistant bot for SibyX. You can ask me about: how to use SibyX, encryption, E2EE, channels, private channels, private DMs, friends, invites, backup, restore, self-hosting, relays, files, notifications, security, privacy, pricing, open source, licenses, and AI bots. Mention @SibyX-AI in a channel, or add me as a friend and message me privately.
en.你好: Hi, I am SibyX-AI. SibyX is built around one idea: one link, instant encrypted communication. No account, no installation, end-to-end encrypted messages, and self-hosting when you want full control.
en.hello: Hi, I am SibyX-AI. SibyX is built around one idea: one link, instant encrypted communication. No account, no installation, end-to-end encrypted messages, and self-hosting when you want full control.
en.你是谁: I am SibyX-AI, the official assistant bot for SibyX. I answer FAQs, post daily tips, and help onboard new users. I will never ask for your private key, mnemonic, backup file, or password, and I do not automatically read everyone's private conversations.
en.sibyx是什么: SibyX is a lightweight private communication tool. Open a link to enter a channel or private room, with no phone number, email, or traditional account. Private DMs and private channels use end-to-end encryption, while the relay only forwards ciphertext. You can use a SibyX-hosted relay or deploy your own.
en.what is sibyx: SibyX is a lightweight private communication tool. Open a link to enter a channel or private room, with no phone number, email, or traditional account. Private DMs and private channels use end-to-end encryption, while the relay only forwards ciphertext. You can use a SibyX-hosted relay or deploy your own.
en.标语: SibyX headline: One link, instant encrypted communication. Subtitle: No account, no installation, end-to-end encrypted messages, and self-hosting when you want full control.
en.slogan: SibyX headline: One link, instant encrypted communication. Subtitle: No account, no installation, end-to-end encrypted messages, and self-hosting when you want full control.
en.怎么用: Quick start: first, open the link and enter without signup or installation. Second, chat in a channel or join a specific room. Third, click the add-friend button beside someone's message, then start an end-to-end encrypted private DM after both sides connect. Fourth, back up your identity key early so you do not lose it after switching devices or clearing browser data.
en.quickstart: Quick start: first, open the link and enter without signup or installation. Second, chat in a channel or join a specific room. Third, click the add-friend button beside someone's message, then start an end-to-end encrypted private DM after both sides connect. Fourth, back up your identity key early so you do not lose it after switching devices or clearing browser data.
en.账号: SibyX does not require a traditional account. Your identity is generated locally in your browser as a cryptographic keypair, not bound to a phone number, email, or platform account. This reduces signup friction and avoids a central account database. If you lose your identity key, SibyX cannot recover it like a normal account, so backup is important.
en.account: SibyX does not require a traditional account. Your identity is generated locally in your browser as a cryptographic keypair, not bound to a phone number, email, or platform account. This reduces signup friction and avoids a central account database. If you lose your identity key, SibyX cannot recover it like a normal account, so backup is important.
en.安装: SibyX does not require installation by default. It runs in the browser, so you can communicate by opening a link. You may add it to your phone or desktop like an app, but that is optional.
en.install: SibyX does not require installation by default. It runs in the browser, so you can communicate by opening a link. You may add it to your phone or desktop like an app, but that is optional.
en.链接: The core SibyX experience is: one link, instant encrypted communication. Someone who receives the link can open it in a browser and enter the target channel or room directly. It works well for temporary projects, small teams, client communication, Web3 circles, and self-hosted communities.
en.link: The core SibyX experience is: one link, instant encrypted communication. Someone who receives the link can open it in a browser and enter the target channel or room directly. It works well for temporary projects, small teams, client communication, Web3 circles, and self-hosted communities.
en.加密: SibyX uses end-to-end encryption for private DMs and private channels. DMs derive a shared key through ECDH and encrypt messages with AES-GCM. Public channels are signed and verifiable, but are not designed as confidential spaces. Private channels encrypt content with a channel key. The relay only forwards ciphertext and cannot read private DM or private channel content.
en.encryption: SibyX uses end-to-end encryption for private DMs and private channels. DMs derive a shared key through ECDH and encrypt messages with AES-GCM. Public channels are signed and verifiable, but are not designed as confidential spaces. Private channels encrypt content with a channel key. The relay only forwards ciphertext and cannot read private DM or private channel content.
en.端到端: End-to-end encryption means plaintext appears only on the sender's and receiver's devices. Servers, relays, and hosting providers should not see message content. SibyX's boundary is simple: private keys and plaintext stay in the browser; the relay only forwards ciphertext, public keys, and necessary metadata.
en.e2ee: E2EE means End-to-End Encryption. In SibyX, private DMs and private channel content are encrypted on the client before being sent, so the relay only sees ciphertext. Public channels are not suitable for sensitive content because they are designed for visibility and verifiability, not confidentiality.
en.中继: A relay is SibyX's message forwarding layer. It works like a pipe that helps browsers sync messages, but it does not hold your private keys and does not decrypt private DMs or private channel content. You can use a public or hosted relay, or deploy your own private relay for more control.
en.relay: A relay is SibyX's message forwarding layer. It works like a pipe that helps browsers sync messages, but it does not hold your private keys and does not decrypt private DMs or private channel content. You can use a public or hosted relay, or deploy your own private relay for more control.
en.服务器: The server or relay may see necessary sync data such as channel names, timestamps, sender addresses, public keys, public channel messages, and ciphertext for private DMs or private channels. It cannot see your private keys and cannot decrypt private content. Public channels are not suitable for sensitive information.
en.server: The server or relay may see necessary sync data such as channel names, timestamps, sender addresses, public keys, public channel messages, and ciphertext for private DMs or private channels. It cannot see your private keys and cannot decrypt private content. Public channels are not suitable for sensitive information.
en.身份: A SibyX identity is not a phone number or account. It is a locally generated keypair. The signing key proves a message came from you, while the encryption key helps establish private DM encryption. Your address is derived from your public key; others can recognize you with it, but they cannot impersonate you.
en.identity: A SibyX identity is not a phone number or account. It is a locally generated keypair. The signing key proves a message came from you, while the encryption key helps establish private DM encryption. Your address is derived from your public key; others can recognize you with it, but they cannot impersonate you.
en.私钥: Your private key should stay only in your local browser or in your encrypted backup. Never send your private key, mnemonic, or backup password to anyone, including anyone claiming to be official support. SibyX-AI will never ask for your private key, mnemonic, or password.
en.private key: Your private key should stay only in your local browser or in your encrypted backup. Never send your private key, mnemonic, or backup password to anyone, including anyone claiming to be official support. SibyX-AI will never ask for your private key, mnemonic, or password.
en.手机号: SibyX does not require a phone number. We believe private communication tools should not force identity to be tied to a phone number. Your identity is generated from a local keypair, which fits temporary collaboration, small teams, developers, Web3 communities, and self-hosted users.
en.phone: SibyX does not require a phone number. We believe private communication tools should not force identity to be tied to a phone number. Your identity is generated from a local keypair, which fits temporary collaboration, small teams, developers, Web3 communities, and self-hosted users.
en.地址: A SibyX address is a short identity identifier derived from your signing public key, usually starting with 0x. It can be public and is used to identify you, add friends, or verify message origin. It is not your private key; knowing your address does not let anyone access your identity.
en.address: A SibyX address is a short identity identifier derived from your signing public key, usually starting with 0x. It can be public and is used to identify you, add friends, or verify message origin. It is not your private key; knowing your address does not let anyone access your identity.
en.频道: A channel is a conversation space grouped by name. People who enter the same channel name join the same channel. Public channels are good for welcome rooms, announcements, testing, and open discussion. Use private DMs or private channels for sensitive content. Channel names may be visible to the relay, so do not put secrets directly in channel names.
en.channel: A channel is a conversation space grouped by name. People who enter the same channel name join the same channel. Public channels are good for welcome rooms, announcements, testing, and open discussion. Use private DMs or private channels for sensitive content. Channel names may be visible to the relay, so do not put secrets directly in channel names.
en.公开频道: Messages in public channels are signed and verifiable, but not encrypted by default. Anyone in the same channel can see the content. Public channels are suitable for lobbies, Q&A, announcements, and non-sensitive discussion. For private content, use private DMs or private channels.
en.public channel: Messages in public channels are signed and verifiable, but not encrypted by default. Anyone in the same channel can see the content. Public channels are suitable for lobbies, Q&A, announcements, and non-sensitive discussion. For private content, use private DMs or private channels.
en.私有频道: A private channel is a member-based encrypted channel. Approved members receive the channel key, and messages are encrypted with that key. People without the channel key may see sync data, but cannot read the content. Private channels fit small teams, client rooms, project groups, and private communities.
en.private channel: A private channel is a member-based encrypted channel. Approved members receive the channel key, and messages are encrypted with that key. People without the channel key may see sync data, but cannot read the content. Private channels fit small teams, client rooms, project groups, and private communities.
en.私聊: A private DM is an end-to-end encrypted conversation between two people. After both sides become friends, the clients derive a shared key from both ECDH public keys and use AES-GCM to encrypt messages. The relay only sees ciphertext and necessary metadata, not the DM content.
en.dm: A private DM is an end-to-end encrypted conversation between two people. After both sides become friends, the clients derive a shared key from both ECDH public keys and use AES-GCM to encrypt messages. The relay only sees ciphertext and necessary metadata, not the DM content.
en.好友: Friendship creates a stable private DM entry. You can click the add-friend button beside someone's channel message. After the other side accepts, you can start an end-to-end encrypted private DM from the friend list. Adding a friend exchanges public keys and signatures, never private keys.
en.friend: Friendship creates a stable private DM entry. You can click the add-friend button beside someone's channel message. After the other side accepts, you can start an end-to-end encrypted private DM from the friend list. Adding a friend exchanges public keys and signatures, never private keys.
en.添加: If you want to add me as a friend, click the add-friend button beside my message in a channel. I will automatically accept the request, and then you can ask me questions in a private DM. Remember: I will never ask for your private key, mnemonic, backup file, or password.
en.add: If you want to add me as a friend, click the add-friend button beside my message in a channel. I will automatically accept the request, and then you can ask me questions in a private DM. Remember: I will never ask for your private key, mnemonic, backup file, or password.
en.邀请: An invite link brings someone into a specific channel or room. SibyX does not force users to register first; it lets them enter the context and communicate, then back up their identity when needed. Before inviting others, check the channel type: public channels are for open discussion, while private channels are for sensitive content.
en.invite: An invite link brings someone into a specific channel or room. SibyX does not force users to register first; it lets them enter the context and communicate, then back up their identity when needed. Before inviting others, check the channel type: public channels are for open discussion, while private channels are for sensitive content.
en.备份: Backup is important. SibyX has no central account system, so your identity cannot be recovered through a phone number or email. Export an encrypted backup in settings and store it offline. The backup is protected by your password; do not upload or share that password. Back up before switching devices, clearing browser data, or reinstalling the browser.
en.backup: Backup is important. SibyX has no central account system, so your identity cannot be recovered through a phone number or email. Export an encrypted backup in settings and store it offline. The backup is protected by your password; do not upload or share that password. Back up before switching devices, clearing browser data, or reinstalling the browser.
en.恢复: Restore imports a previously backed-up identity into a new device or browser. Use the restore function, import the encrypted backup, and enter the backup password to recover the same SibyX identity. Restore only works if you have both the backup and password; the platform cannot reset it for you.
en.restore: Restore imports a previously backed-up identity into a new device or browser. Use the restore function, import the encrypted backup, and enter the backup password to recover the same SibyX identity. Restore only works if you have both the backup and password; the platform cannot reset it for you.
en.丢失: If you lose your identity backup, mnemonic, or backup password, SibyX usually cannot recover the original identity. This is the trade-off of account-free, local-key identity. You can generate a new identity and continue using SibyX, but the old identity, friend relationships, and history encrypted for the old key may not be recoverable.
en.lost: If you lose your identity backup, mnemonic, or backup password, SibyX usually cannot recover the original identity. This is the trade-off of account-free, local-key identity. You can generate a new identity and continue using SibyX, but the old identity, friend relationships, and history encrypted for the old key may not be recoverable.
en.多设备: Multi-device use depends on safely restoring the same identity. Export an encrypted backup from the original device and restore it on the new device. The new device can then use the same SibyX identity. Do not send unencrypted private keys or passwords to yourself through chat apps.
en.multi: Multi-device use depends on safely restoring the same identity. Export an encrypted backup from the original device and restore it on the new device. The new device can then use the same SibyX identity. Do not send unencrypted private keys or passwords to yourself through chat apps.
en.自托管: Self-hosting means you can deploy the SibyX relay on your own VPS or server. This gives you control over the runtime environment, domain, logging policy, and availability. As long as the server only forwards ciphertext and never handles private keys or plaintext, self-hosting does not break the E2EE boundary.
en.self-host: Self-hosting means you can deploy the SibyX relay on your own VPS or server. This gives you control over the runtime environment, domain, logging policy, and availability. As long as the server only forwards ciphertext and never handles private keys or plaintext, self-hosting does not break the E2EE boundary.
en.托管: A hosted relay is for individuals and small teams that do not want to run a server. SibyX can provide a more stable always-on relay, but the hosting provider still should not read private DM or private channel plaintext. Hosting solves connection, uptime, and operations; it does not hold your private keys.
en.hosted: A hosted relay is for individuals and small teams that do not want to run a server. SibyX can provide a more stable always-on relay, but the hosting provider still should not read private DM or private channel plaintext. Hosting solves connection, uptime, and operations; it does not hold your private keys.
en.价格: SibyX can keep personal communication lightweight and open. The natural paid value is stable private relays, hosted operations, custom domains, larger attachments, team setup, and deployment support. SibyX is not merely selling chat features; it provides controllable private encrypted communication infrastructure for individuals and small teams.
en.pricing: SibyX can keep personal communication lightweight and open. The natural paid value is stable private relays, hosted operations, custom domains, larger attachments, team setup, and deployment support. SibyX is not merely selling chat features; it provides controllable private encrypted communication infrastructure for individuals and small teams.
en.pro: Pro or paid capabilities may include a more stable relay, larger attachments, voice or media features, private relays, team setup, custom domains, and priority support. Exact benefits depend on the current product page. Paid or free, your private keys should never leave your device.
en.文件: Files and attachments should be encrypted on the client before upload or sync. The relay or object storage should only see encrypted files and pointers, not plaintext file content. Send sensitive files through private DMs or private channels, not public channels.
en.file: Files and attachments should be encrypted on the client before upload or sync. The relay or object storage should only see encrypted files and pointers, not plaintext file content. Send sensitive files through private DMs or private channels, not public channels.
en.附件: Attachments follow the same security principle as messages: plaintext should appear only on sender and receiver devices. When sending an attachment, the client should encrypt it first, then sync ciphertext or an encrypted pointer. Check the channel type before sending; do not send sensitive attachments in public channels.
en.attachment: Attachments follow the same security principle as messages: plaintext should appear only on sender and receiver devices. When sending an attachment, the client should encrypt it first, then sync ciphertext or an encrypted pointer. Check the channel type before sending; do not send sensitive attachments in public channels.
en.通知: Notifications remind you when someone mentions you, sends a private DM, or posts an important channel message. Browser notifications require your permission. For privacy, notification previews should avoid exposing sensitive content, especially on lock screens or shared devices.
en.notification: Notifications remind you when someone mentions you, sends a private DM, or posts an important channel message. Browser notifications require your permission. For privacy, notification previews should avoid exposing sensitive content, especially on lock screens or shared devices.
en.推送: Web Push can alert you about new messages while the page is in the background. Ideally, push should carry only a signal such as “new message available”, not sensitive content. You can manage notification permissions in your browser or system settings.
en.push: Web Push can alert you about new messages while the page is in the background. Ideally, push should carry only a signal such as “new message available”, not sensitive content. You can manage notification permissions in your browser or system settings.
en.安全: SibyX's security boundary is: private keys stay on the device, private DMs and private channels are end-to-end encrypted, and the relay does not read plaintext. You still need to protect your device, browser, backup files, and passwords. Do not click suspicious links, do not leak backups, and do not send sensitive information in public channels.
en.security: SibyX's security boundary is: private keys stay on the device, private DMs and private channels are end-to-end encrypted, and the relay does not read plaintext. You still need to protect your device, browser, backup files, and passwords. Do not click suspicious links, do not leak backups, and do not send sensitive information in public channels.
en.隐私: SibyX privacy focuses on: no phone number or central account, locally generated and stored private keys, end-to-end encrypted private DMs and private channels, and relay-only ciphertext forwarding. Note that public channel content is visible to channel members, and metadata such as time, channel name, and address may be visible to the relay.
en.privacy: SibyX privacy focuses on: no phone number or central account, locally generated and stored private keys, end-to-end encrypted private DMs and private channels, and relay-only ciphertext forwarding. Note that public channel content is visible to channel members, and metadata such as time, channel name, and address may be visible to the relay.
en.匿名: SibyX does not require an account or phone number, so it exposes less identity data than traditional account systems. But it is not an absolute anonymity tool: your address, nickname, public channel messages, timestamps, and network-level information may still provide clues. Do not treat public channels as anonymous safe zones.
en.anonymous: SibyX does not require an account or phone number, so it exposes less identity data than traditional account systems. But it is not an absolute anonymity tool: your address, nickname, public channel messages, timestamps, and network-level information may still provide clues. Do not treat public channels as anonymous safe zones.
en.元数据: End-to-end encryption protects message content, but it does not necessarily hide all metadata. The relay may see channel names, timestamps, message sizes, sender addresses, public keys, receipts, and connection information. SibyX aims to keep content confidential while remaining lightweight and self-hostable.
en.metadata: End-to-end encryption protects message content, but it does not necessarily hide all metadata. The relay may see channel names, timestamps, message sizes, sender addresses, public keys, receipts, and connection information. SibyX aims to keep content confidential while remaining lightweight and self-hostable.
en.开源: Open source and end-to-end encryption are two different dimensions. Open source lets people audit the code. E2EE ensures that the server cannot see private DM or private channel plaintext at runtime. The ideal SibyX model is: auditable key code, relay only forwarding ciphertext, and private keys plus plaintext appearing only on user devices.
en.open source: Open source and end-to-end encryption are two different dimensions. Open source lets people audit the code. E2EE ensures that the server cannot see private DM or private channel plaintext at runtime. The ideal SibyX model is: auditable key code, relay only forwarding ciphertext, and private keys plus plaintext appearing only on user devices.
en.license: SibyX can use a per-component multi-license model: MIT for the SDK to maximize adoption, Apache-2.0 for the web client to make enterprise use easier, AGPL-3.0 for the relay core to discourage closed-source competing hosted services, and a commercial service agreement for hosted offerings. Logos, names, and brand assets are usually not covered by the open-source licenses.
en.ai: SibyX-AI is a rule-based assistant bot for product FAQs and tips. It does not automatically read everyone's private messages. In channels, it replies only when mentioned with @SibyX-AI; in private DMs, messages to the bot are treated as intentional questions.
en.机器人: SibyX-AI can answer common questions in channels and help through private DMs. It is useful for onboarding, daily tips, channel guidance, and security reminders. It should not be designed as a backend AI that reads all user conversations, because that would break the E2EE boundary.
en.bot: SibyX-AI can answer common questions in channels and help through private DMs. It is useful for onboarding, daily tips, channel guidance, and security reminders. It should not be designed as a backend AI that reads all user conversations, because that would break the E2EE boundary.
en.agent: SibyX can also extend into AI Agent communication. The core idea is: an agent's identity can be a key, not a centralized API key. SibyX handles private transport and key-based identity, while agent frameworks handle task semantics and workflows.
en.sdk: The goal of the SibyX SDK is to package identity, encryption, and relay capabilities into a reusable developer library. The ideal flow is: generate a local key identity, connect to any SibyX relay, and send end-to-end encrypted messages. The SDK fits developers, small teams, agent projects, and self-hosted integrations.
en.开发者: For developers, SibyX is not just another chat app. It is a lightweight, self-hostable, account-free E2EE communication layer. You can use it to build private team rooms, project channels, agent message channels, or embedded encrypted communication features.
en.developer: For developers, SibyX is not just another chat app. It is a lightweight, self-hostable, account-free E2EE communication layer. You can use it to build private team rooms, project channels, agent message channels, or embedded encrypted communication features.
en.团队: SibyX fits individuals, small teams, and small organizations. Its strengths are link-based entry, no installation, no account, end-to-end encrypted private DMs and private channels, and private relay control. It is not meant to replace every large enterprise collaboration suite, but works well as a lightweight private communication room.
en.team: SibyX fits individuals, small teams, and small organizations. Its strengths are link-based entry, no installation, no account, end-to-end encrypted private DMs and private channels, and private relay control. It is not meant to replace every large enterprise collaboration suite, but works well as a lightweight private communication room.
en.web3: For Web3 communities, SibyX's value is “key as identity.” It does not require a phone number or central account, which fits DAO circles, project collaboration, temporary discussion, and key-identity experiments. Note that SibyX is not the same as wallet login, and you should never expose wallet private keys or mnemonics in public channels.
en.客户: SibyX can support the “one encrypted room per client” workflow. A client does not need to install an app or register first; they can open a link and start communicating. For sensitive client content, use private channels or private DMs, and explain the importance of identity backup early.
en.client: SibyX can support the “one encrypted room per client” workflow. A client does not need to install an app or register first; they can open a link and start communicating. For sensitive client content, use private channels or private DMs, and explain the importance of identity backup early.
en.signal: Signal is a mature, trusted, long-tested secure messenger. SibyX should not claim to be more secure than Signal. SibyX is different because it offers no phone number, no installation, link-based entry, lightweight self-hosting, and private relays. It is better suited for small teams, developers, self-hosters, and temporary private rooms.
en.telegram: Telegram is strong in large groups, channels, bots, and distribution. SibyX is not trying to become a massive social platform. It focuses on small-scope private communication: no account, no installation, E2EE private DMs and private channels, and self-hostable relays.
en.matrix: Matrix / Element is a powerful open protocol and self-hosted collaboration ecosystem, well-suited for organizational deployment. SibyX is lighter: one link to enter, simpler to deploy and use, and better for individuals, small teams, temporary projects, and users who do not want to maintain a complex communication stack.
en.局限: SibyX has limits: public channels are not confidential spaces; E2EE does not hide all metadata; if you lose your identity backup, the platform usually cannot recover it; self-hosting requires basic operations skills; it is not a full enterprise suite or an absolute anonymity tool.
en.limit: SibyX has limits: public channels are not confidential spaces; E2EE does not hide all metadata; if you lose your identity backup, the platform usually cannot recover it; self-hosting requires basic operations skills; it is not a full enterprise suite or an absolute anonymity tool.
en.滥用: SibyX is for lawful private communication by individuals and teams. It does not support scams, harassment, malware coordination, illegal marketplaces, or other abuse. Hosted relays may be suspended based on infrastructure signals, payment risk, spam reports, or terms violations, but not by reading end-to-end encrypted message content.
en.abuse: SibyX is for lawful private communication by individuals and teams. It does not support scams, harassment, malware coordination, illegal marketplaces, or other abuse. Hosted relays may be suspended based on infrastructure signals, payment risk, spam reports, or terms violations, but not by reading end-to-end encrypted message content.
en.手机: SibyX can run in a mobile browser and can be added to the home screen for an app-like experience. To avoid losing your identity, export an encrypted backup before clearing browser data, switching browsers, or changing devices.
en.mobile: SibyX can run in a mobile browser and can be added to the home screen for an app-like experience. To avoid losing your identity, export an encrypted backup before clearing browser data, switching browsers, or changing devices.
en.浏览器: SibyX relies on browser local storage and WebCrypto. Use a modern browser and avoid frequently clearing site data. If browser data is cleared and you have no identity backup, the original identity may not be recoverable.
en.browser: SibyX relies on browser local storage and WebCrypto. Use a modern browser and avoid frequently clearing site data. If browser data is cleared and you have no identity backup, the original identity may not be recoverable.

__default__.zh: 我是 SibyX-AI。你可以问我：怎么用、加密、端到端、频道、私有频道、私聊、好友、邀请、备份、恢复、自托管、中继、文件、通知、安全、隐私、价格、开源、License、AI 机器人。频道里请 @SibyX-AI 提问，也可以把我加为好友后私聊。
__default__.en: I am SibyX-AI. You can ask me about how to use SibyX, encryption, E2EE, channels, private channels, private DMs, friends, invites, backup, restore, self-hosting, relays, files, notifications, security, privacy, pricing, open source, licenses, and AI bots. Mention @SibyX-AI in a channel, or add me as a friend and message me privately.
